untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculating candle height as (highest_high - lowest_low) / breakout_price and comparing to median historical value. This custom ratio calculation and median comparison logic cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The 'breakout_price' reference point is undefined, and no indicator exists for dynamic median-based candle height normalization. Market regime detection (bull/bear) is also contextual and not directly available as an allowed indicator.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires: (1) a custom candle height metric normalized by breakout price, (2) comparison against rolling median of that metric, (3) explicit bull/bear market classification. The allowed indicators do not support computing custom ratios or percentile-based thresholds. Suggest implementing as custom Python function in backtest engine or reformulating using available indicators like bb_pct_b (for range position) or adx_14 (for trend strength).
